blended.narrative: Cascade Mountain is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 3.7 inches of wet, heavy snow expected. Snow levels around 948 ft. Looking ahead, 20 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Sunday: 6" of snow, highs of 33°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Monday: 10" of heavy snow, highs of 28°F, winds around 22 mph. Expect powder.
Wednesday: 2.1" of snow, highs of 39°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
